{{Quote|I don't take any smart talk from treads. If they get in my way, I offer them a quick trip out the nearest airlock.|Unofficial comments regarding the Imperial Army by Danos|<ref name="ISB" />}}
'''Danos''' was a [[Training Lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Danos lectured on inter-service cooperation between Naval and [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] forces, citing that negative attitudes toward Army personnel was counter-productive. In private, however, Danos had a low view of the Army.<ref name="ISB" />
